com.gpudb.filesystem.common

    Package Description
    com.gpudb.filesystem

  • Classes in com.gpudb.filesystem.common used by com.gpudb.filesystem 
    Class Description
    KifsDirectoryInfo  
    KifsFileInfo  
  • Classes in com.gpudb.filesystem.common used by com.gpudb.filesystem.common 
    Class Description
    FullFileBatchManager
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    KifsFileInfo  
    OpMode
    This is an enum indicating whether a particular operation is an upload or a download This is an enum used by the class Result which is used by the interfaces FileUploadListener and FileDownloadListener
    Result
    This class encapsulates information about the outcome of an upload or a download operation.
  • Classes in com.gpudb.filesystem.common used by com.gpudb.filesystem.download 
    Class Description
    FileOperation
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    KifsFileInfo  
    Result
    This class encapsulates information about the outcome of an upload or a download operation.
  • Classes in com.gpudb.filesystem.common used by com.gpudb.filesystem.upload 
    Class Description
    FileOperation
    This is an internal class and not meant to be used by the end users of the filesystem API.
    Result
    This class encapsulates information about the outcome of an upload or a download operation.
